The Prevention of Delay Act, 2005.
General Administration Department, Government Decision No. SRV-2017 / Q.No. 415 / Executive - 12,
Government Orders -
Regulation of transfers of Maharashtra Government employees and in the discharge of government duties.
Maharashtra Education Service (Education Empowerment Branch) as per the provision of the Prevention of Delay Act, 2005.
The following officers of the Probationary Cadre in Group-B are being transferred periodically:
They are being given positions in front of their names in the table below, as shown in column-4.

para_trans: The Commissioner (Education), Pune, vide this order, has relieved these officers from their present charge with immediate effect.
Immediately inform the concerned Controller about the discharge and the officer transferred is prescribed.
Make sure you join the given position within the time frame and report back.
submitted to the government.
3. At the place of posting assigned to the aforesaid officer in accordance with the order of such posting.
If they fail to appear or if they try to change the position under any kind of pressure
This act is in violation of Rule 23 of the Maharashtra Civil Services (Conduct) Rules, 1979.
It should be noted that disciplinary action will be taken against them on the grounds of misconduct.
4. These orders "regulate transfers of Maharashtra Government employees and in the discharge of government duties."
Issued with the approval of the competent authorities under the provisions of the Prevention of Delay Act, 2005.
are being done.
The Government Order is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
